{{Infobox artifact
| name = Quickriver
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Quickriver is an [[Archlord]]-class weapon wielded by Sophara. Constructed from [[liquid steel]], the weapon possesses a versatile physical form that can transition between a whip and various bladed implements, such as a saber or a short, wide [[sword]]. Sophara manipulates the weapon's shape and reach by channeling her [[madra]] into it. In combat, Quickriver has been used to deflect projectiles, strike opponents in midair, and inflict significant injuries, including piercing a chest and shredding an arm. The weapon has also been shown to clash with the blades of other skilled combatants.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Quickriver is an [[Archlord weapon]] utilized by Sophara that takes the form of a whip made from [[liquid steel]]. This versatile tool can be manipulated to stiffen into a saber or used as a liquid metal blade. During her confrontation with [[Ruby]], Sophara slashed the weapon against her opponent. Following this strike, Quickriver became covered in orange flame.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Quickriver]] is an [[Archlord weapon]] that is a whip of [[liquid steel]] which can stiffen into a saber.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Quickriver]] is a whip used by Sophara.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Quickriver]] is a whip that can also be used as a liquid metal blade.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Quickriver]] is a liquid metal blade.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara slashed [[Quickriver]] at [[Ruby]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Quickriver]] was covered in orange flame.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
